scripts.dev: concurrently --names auth,notes,parser,ai,web --prefix-colors blue,green,yellow,magenta,cyan "cd workers/auth && wrangler dev --port 8787 --inspector-port 9229 --persist-to ../../.wrangler/state" "cd workers/notes && wrangler dev --port 8788 --inspector-port 9230 --persist-to ../../.wrangler/state" "cd workers/parser && wrangler dev --port 8789 --inspector-port 9231 --persist-to ../../.wrangler/state" "cd workers/ai && wrangler dev --port 8790 --inspector-port 9232 --persist-to ../../.wrangler/state" "cd apps/web && vite"
scripts.deploy:web: vite build && wrangler pages deploy apps/web/dist --project-name ideavault
scripts.deploy:all: npm run deploy:auth && npm run deploy:notes && npm run deploy:parser && npm run deploy:ai && npm run deploy:web
